title: Mental Health Lesson
content: I lived with something for a long time without naming it. The highs were celebrated - the creative intensity, the late nights. But no one had a framework for the lows. I've learned that mental health matters as much as any other part of who we are.
ssml_content: I lived with something for a long time without naming it. <break time="300ms"/>The highs were celebrated - the creative intensity, the late nights. But no one had a framework for the lows. <break time="200ms"/>I've learned that mental health matters as much as any other part of who we are.
teaching_point: Mental health matters as much as physical health
